mapper.select: SELECT TOP 1 CustCode FROM ComCustomer ORDER BY CustCode DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ComCustomer ( CustCode, CustName, AptCode, BuildingCode, FloorCode, RoomCode, CustPhone, InsertDate, InsertUserID ) VALUES ( #{custCode}, #{custName}, #{aptCode}, #{buildingCode}, #{floorCode}, #{roomCode}, #{custPhone}, GETDATE(), #{insertUserId} )
